message:
test: add DML, UPSERT, and join pattern conformance oracle coverage

New oracle tests:
- test_conformance_dml_upsert: REPLACE, INSERT OR REPLACE/IGNORE,
  UPDATE/DELETE with expressions and subqueries
- test_conformance_join_patterns: self-join, CROSS JOIN, LEFT JOIN
  anti-join, EXISTS, NOT IN, derived tables, HAVING with alias

All 1594 core tests pass, 0 failures.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
